summary: All four claimed architecture-surface repairs verify against the live registry, watchdog code, monitor code, and latest output artifacts. The gateway-job coverage invariant is present and currently satisfied, the added key jobs are present, and the only live monitor issue remains the real marketing independent-verification failure.
verified_repairs: All enabled architecture-scoped Gateway jobs currently detected by loop_integrity_audit.py are explicitly owned in self_improvement_loops.json.
loop_integrity_audit.py now enforces a durable gateway-job-registry-coverage invariant for enabled architecture-scoped Gateway jobs.
health_monitor.py KEY_JOBS now includes marketing-research-daily, marketing-daily, and Push research findings to git repo.

Current outputs remain truthful: loop_integrity_latest.json shows no gateway-job-registry-coverage error, and health_monitor_latest.json reports exactly one issue: the marketing independent-verification failure.
remaining_blockers: autonomous-marketing-stack still fails its verifier pass-phrase check in loop_integrity_latest.json.
health_monitor_latest.json still records the real marketing_independent_verification loop_verification_fail verdict.

evidence.details: autonomous-marketing-stack owns the 12 active marketing-scoped job IDs in self_improvement_loops.json lines 29-72; system-health-monitor, ralph-site-owner-loop, blocked-channel-recovery, agent-architecture-watchdog, research-findings-sync, and codeberg-github-mirror-sync each declare their enabled owner job IDs in lines 75-163. A read-only recomputation using loop_integrity_audit.py's own scope rule found 17 enabled architecture-scoped jobs and 0 uncovered IDs.

The audit script loads Gateway jobs, computes covered owner IDs from registry ownerCronJob/ownerCronJobs fields, and appends a gateway-job-registry-coverage error result whenever any enabled architecture-scoped Gateway job lacks registry ownership.
KEY_JOBS explicitly contains marketing-research-daily, marketing-daily, and Push research findings to git repo.

loop_integrity_latest.json contains no gateway-job-registry-coverage entry; its live errors are limited here to autonomous-marketing-stack verifier pass-phrase failure. health_monitor_latest.json reports issues_found=1 and that single issue is marketing_independent_verification with verdict fail.
